title: Certified Action Record
description: The cryptographically signed, tamper-evident proof that an authorization decision was made before an AI agent action executed. Produced by every ARES-v1 evaluation. Immutable after issuance.

car_id.description: Unique sequential identifier for this record. Never reused.

version.description: The ARES-v1 version that produced this CAR.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at the moment of decision. Not the moment of execution.

agent_id.description: The credentialed agent identity from the Trust Registry.

agent_credential.description: The active credential ID verified at evaluation time.

action.description: The action the agent attempted to execute.

resource.description: The target resource or system the action was directed at.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the action payload. The payload itself is not stored in the CAR.

risk_score.description: Composite risk score from 0 to 100 across all 14 evaluation layers.

risk_classification.description: Risk classification based on composite risk score.

policy_triggered.description: The specific policy rule that determined the decision. Null if no policy was triggered.

decision.description: The authorization decision. Always present. Never null.

enforcement.description: The enforcement action taken as a result of the decision.

evaluation_layers.description: The 14 assessment layers evaluated in sequence.

compliance_mapping.description: The regulatory framework requirements satisfied by this CAR.

human_escalation.description: Null for ALLOW and DENY decisions. Contains escalation record for ESCALATE decisions.

car_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the full CAR content before signing.

signature.description: Ed25519 cryptographic signature of the car_hash.

public_key.description: The public key required to verify the signature.

immutable.description: Always true. CARs cannot be altered after issuance.

ledger_position.description: The position of this CAR in the append-only audit ledger.
